title: UltimateReport
description: ✨plugin that allows players to report issues or players directly to a Discord server✨
body:
![UR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4e71956ca19eb7774e6a84a985f2fd573ee403.png)
**UltimateReport** is a versatile Minecraft plugin that allows players to report issues or problematic players directly to a designated Discord server. This plugin is designed to be highly configurable, enabling server administrators to tailor the reporting process to their specific needs. With support for MiniMessage and legacy color codes, UltimateReport ensures that messages are formatted clearly and attractively, both in-game and in Discord.

## Features:

1. Configurable Reporting: Customize the reporting format, messages, and behavior to suit your server's needs.
2. Discord Integration: Send reports directly to a specified Discord channel for quick and efficient moderation.
3. MiniMessage Support: Utilize advanced text formatting, such as gradients and special effects, for visually appealing messages.
4. Legacy Color Codes: Easily use traditional Minecraft color codes for compatibility with older versions and simple color formatting.

## Commands:

- /report "offender" "report":
> Allows a player to report another player by specifying the offender's username and a brief description of the issue or behavior being reported. This report will be sent to the configured Discord channel for moderators to review.

- /ur (ultimatereport) reload: 
> Reloads the plugin configuration, allowing any changes made to the configuration files to take effect without needing to restart the server.
